name: Feature request
about: Propose a new SURGE capability or API change

labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []

## Problem / use case

<!-- What are you trying to do that SURGE does not do today? Concrete
examples (dataset shape, model family, deployment target, HPC setting)
are much more useful than abstractions. -->

## Proposal

<!-- Sketch the user-facing surface. A YAML `SurrogateWorkflowSpec`
fragment or a code snippet showing the call site is ideal. -->

```yaml
# Example YAML showing how a user would exercise the feature.
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds in the current API, or other designs you rejected and why. -->

## Scope / compatibility

- Is this a breaking change to an existing public API?
- Does it require a new optional dependency?
- Does it interact with the resource policy (see
  `surge/hpc/policy.py` and `docs/REFACTORING_PLAN.md` §2)?

## Roadmap fit

<!-- Link to the relevant section of docs/ROADMAP.md or
docs/REFACTORING_PLAN.md if this is a scheduled item, or propose where
it should be added. -->
